name: Raidraptor - Final Fortress Falcon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＲＲ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>レイド・ラプターズ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ファイナル・フォートレス・ファルコン
desc:
3 Level 12 monsters
If this card has a "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster as material, it is unaffected by other cards' effects. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; return all your banished "Raidraptor" monsters to your GY. Up to twice per turn, when this attacking card destroys a monster by battle: You can banish 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster from your GY; this card can attack again in a row.
mnst_eff:
3 Level 12 monsters

Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; return all your banished "Raidraptor" monsters to your GY. Up to twice per turn, when this attacking card destroys a monster by battle: You can banish 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster from your GY; this card can attack again in a row.
eff:
3 Level 12 monsters
If this card has a "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster as material, it is unaffected by other cards' effects. Once per turn: You can detach 1 material from this card; return all your banished "Raidraptor" monsters to your GY. Up to twice per turn, when this attacking card destroys a monster by battle: You can banish 1 "Raidraptor" Xyz Monster from your GY; this card can attack again in a row.

action: Applies effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
Returns the player's banished cards to the Graveyard
Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
